description_long: This is a mid-rise brick hotel building with four main stories and a flat roof, topped by two cylindrical metal water towers. The facade features regularly spaced rectangular windows, some with air conditioning units, and a prominent vertical neon sign reading 'HOTEL' on one corner. Fire escapes run along one side of the building, providing emergency egress from each floor. The ground level includes a recessed main entrance, flanked by a few small street-level details such as a fire hydrant, trash bins, and a lamppost. The surrounding sidewalk and street are detailed with urban elements like road markings, utility covers, and scattered debris, enhancing the city atmosphere.
description: A four-story brick hotel with rooftop water towers, fire escapes, and a neon 'HOTEL' sign, set in a detailed urban streetscape.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two rooftop water towers, and a clear view of the brick facade with windows and street-level details.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the metal fire escapes, a single rooftop water tower, and more urban street elements like trash bins and a lamppost.
description_view_2: Rear view with the neon 'HOTEL' sign visible, two water towers, and a less detailed ground level with a utility cover and street markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a plain brick wall, service doors, and minimal street features, with one water tower visible on the roof.
attribute_hotel_signage: Vertical illuminated sign reading 'HOTEL' on the corner of the building, visible in view 2.
